title: rosa lutetiana var. andegavensis
intro: Rosa lutetiana var. andegavensis, also known as the Andegavensis rose, is a rare and historic variety of the Rosa lutetiana species, native to Europe and known for its delicate, pink-hued flowers and rich fragrance. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rosa lutetiana var. andegavensis include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve circulation, as well as its potential to support the immune system and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and stems can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
